# Babbar & Babbar Architects (bbArch)

> Multidisciplinary architecture practice in New Delhi, India — architects, city
> planners, interior designers and landscape architects with over 40 years of
> partner-led work across India, the Gulf, Mauritius and Russia. ISO 9001:2008.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.bbarch.com/): Practice overview
- [About](https://www.bbarch.com/about.html): History, ideology, ecological design principles
- [Partners](https://www.bbarch.com/partners.html): Ameet Babbar, Anupama Babbar Singh, Baldev Babbar, Santosh Auluck
- [Projects](https://www.bbarch.com/projects.html): Hotels, institutes, embassies, cultural centres, housing & townships
- [Careers](https://www.bbarch.com/careers.html): Current openings
- [Contact](https://www.bbarch.com/contact.html): +91 11 4470 7378 · info@bbarch.net

## Machine-readable data
- [Structured project data (JSON)](https://www.bbarch.com/data/projects.json)

## Notable work
Indian Embassy Muscat (competition win), Indian Consulate Dubai (competition win),
FICCI Auditorium New Delhi, Hotel Park New Delhi, Sheraton Beach Resort Mauritius,
Delhi Institute of Technology (competition win).
